title: brassica cretica subsp. cretica
intro: Brassica cretica subsp. cretica, also known as Cretan kale, is a subspecies of wild cabbage native to the eastern Mediterranean region. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Brassica cretica subsp. cretica is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also consumed as a leafy green vegetable.
